idea-plugin.name: kUML
idea-plugin.description:
kUML — Kotlin-based UML & C4 modelling

Adds first-class IntelliJ support for kUML diagram scripts (*.kuml.kts):

  • Recognises *.kuml.kts as a custom Kotlin script kind via the org.jetbrains.kotlin.scriptDefinitionsProvider extension point.
  • Syntax highlighting and structural navigation are inherited from IntelliJ's Kotlin language support — no custom lexer or parser.
  • Default imports for the kUML DSL (dev.kuml.core.dsl.*, dev.kuml.uml.dsl.*, dev.kuml.c4.dsl.*) are visible to the editor, so unqualified classDiagram { ... }, c4Model { ... }, and friends resolve without explicit imports.
  • Distinct file icon for kUML scripts.

Rendering, code generation, OCL validation, and state-machine simulation are provided by the kuml CLI and the dev.kuml Gradle plugin — this IDE plugin is intentionally minimal and stays out of the render pipeline.

Project page: https://kuml.dev.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release: script definition provider, file type registration, file icon.
